title: EPR for packaging: updated illustrative base fees (December 2024)
body: "New regulations apply to all UK organisations that import or supply packaging. The regulations mean that these organisations may be responsible for the costs of dealing with packaging waste. This is called extended producer responsibility (EPR) for packaging.  This document provides the latest estimate of illustrative base fees for year 1 of EPR for packaging.  Estimated fees are now provided as single figures, rather than as a range of figures.  Previous estimates were published in August and September 2024 "
